scope: single-seed no-training 16-state exact-readout comparison of vector-only, edge-only and combined coordinate bases under FP32/BF16; no optimizer step, production mutation, search, checkpoint or later Gate

decision_rule.selection: qualify each single branch independently; if both pass choose vector_only because it has fewer affine parameters, otherwise choose the only passing branch
decision_rule.pass: authorize a separately frozen no-training production qualification of only the selected single branch before any memorization run
decision_rule.fail: retain the compact current production head and require a separately frozen target-free equivariant orthogonal-residual basis; do not train or search
decision_rule.boundary: This no-training audit cannot qualify H1a, mutate production, initialize a checkpoint, add steps/seeds, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
